repo.name: awesome-ios
repo.description: A curated list of awesome iOS ecosystem, including Objective-C and Swift Projects

repo.name: SQLite.swift
repo.description: A type-safe, Swift-language layer over SQLite3.

repo.name: Disk
repo.description: Easily persist structs, images, and data on iOS

repo.name: SwiftTerm
repo.description: Xterm/VT100 Terminal emulator in Swift

repo.name: reminders-cli
repo.description: A simple CLI for interacting with macOS reminders

repo.name: Maccy
repo.description: Lightweight clipboard manager for macOS

repo.name: MicGuardian
repo.description: I hate when Airpods hijacks my expensive microphone input on my Mac.

repo.name: baton
repo.description: Baton — Swift AI code-review orchestrator for monorepos.

repo.name: calendario
repo.description: Lightweight macOS menubar calendar with event indicators and one-click meeting join

repo.name: BaoLianDeng
repo.description: A macOS VPN proxy app powered by Mihomo (Clash Meta)

repo.name: XcodeGen
repo.description: A Swift command line tool for generating your Xcode project

repo.name: OpenParsec
repo.description: An open-source Parsec client for iOS/iPadOS. This repo implements mouse & keyboard & touch screen support.

repo.name: Reusable
repo.description: A Swift mixin for reusing views easily and in a type-safe way (UITableViewCells, UICollectionViewCells, custom UIViews, ViewControllers, …

repo.name: DKCamera
repo.description: A light weight & simple & easy camera for iOS by Swift.

repo.name: VoiceInk
repo.description: The best open-source alternative to Superwhisper & Wispr Flow. Voice-to-text app for macOS with no subscription

repo.name: textual
repo.description: Render and customize rich attributed text in SwiftUI

repo.name: iMCP
repo.description: A macOS app that provides an MCP server to your Messages, Contacts, Reminders and more

repo.name: swift-android-sdk
repo.description: Android SDKs for Swift

repo.name: VisualProgrammingLanguage
repo.description: Visual programming language written in Swift that assembles to executable Swift code.

repo.name: SwiftFormat
repo.description: A command-line tool and Xcode Extension for formatting Swift code

repo.name: PhoneNumberKit
repo.description: A Swift framework for parsing, formatting and validating international phone numbers. Inspired by Google's libphonenumber.

repo.name: Files
repo.description: A nicer way to handle files & folders in Swift

repo.name: PathKit
repo.description: Effortless path operations in Swift

repo.name: photo-x
repo.description: A fast macOS culling viewer for paired RAW + HEIF photo shoots.

repo.name: InstantSpaceSwitcher
repo.description: Native space switching on macOS with no animation
